video_caption: My skin gets SO sensitive in the winter so I stopped all actives a month ago which has done WONDERS. But now I’m experiencing extreme dryness and flakiness. The reason being is because our natural skin cell turnover (without exfoliating) is 30 days sooo right on time, now I have a build up on dead skin cells 😭 If you’re someone like me whose skin becomes very sensitive to the cold weather, just decrease the amount of times you exfoliate / use a retinoid a week. I was exfoliating my skin every day prior to the winter season, so now I just need to play around with my exfoliating serums and retinoids to see how often my skin can tolerate them!

video_caption: Just because you’re breaking out doesn’t mean you NEED to use a chemical exfoliant, benzoyl peroxide or a retinoid!! To put an end to this vicious cycle, you have to take a break from ALL actives (yes that includes your vitamin C) and focus on skin barrier repairing products to allow your skin to heal. My holy grail products to hydrate & soothe the skin are a hypochlorous acid spray, avene cicalfate serum and avene cicalfate cream!
